[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:1:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/verb-leverage[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 4
"[3mWe leverage creator rizz to unlock authentic engagement.[0m"

Problem:
'leverage' as a verb reads corporate.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mUse 'use'.[0m

[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:1:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/construction-unlock-abstract[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 5
"[3mWe leverage creator rizz to unlock authentic engagement.[0m"

Problem:
This uses a vague 'unlock + abstract noun' construction.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mSay what becomes possible.[0m

[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:2:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/construction-drive-abstract[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 5
"[3mWe need to drive alignment across stakeholders.[0m"

Problem:
This uses a vague 'drive + abstract noun' construction.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mSay who is doing what and what changes.[0m

[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:3:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/phrase-circle-back[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 4
"[3mLet's circle back on the low-hanging fruit to move the needle.[0m"

Problem:
'circle back' is corporate filler.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mUse 'follow up'.[0m

[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:3:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/phrase-move-the-needle[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 5
"[3mLet's circle back on the low-hanging fruit to move the needle.[0m"

Problem:
'move the needle' is vague business jargon.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mName the metric that changes.[0m

[38;5;240mcorporate.input.txt[0m:3:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/phrase-low-hanging-fruit[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 4
"[3mLet's circle back on the low-hanging fruit to move the needle.[0m"

Problem:
'low-hanging fruit' is stale business phrasing.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mSay the specific easy task.[0m
